_comment: Lumora - Human Starting City. Full town definition with NPCs, trainers, merchants, services, and factions.
biome: oasis citadel, sandstone walls, central oasis
atmosphere: A prosperous sandstone citadel built around a massive oasis. Bustling markets, sun temples, fortified walls, and the Paladin’s Vigil statue create a sense of order at the edge of a dangerous desert.
landmarks: Oasisheart Citadel (Warden headquarters, main quest hub)
Sandveil Bazaar (merchants, trade stalls, shady dealings)
Solaris Vault (relic chamber containing the Light of Solara)
Dawnspire Altar (shrine with fragments of the Sword of Light prophecy)

oasis_wardens.description: Defenders of Lumora and guardians of the oasis.

sandveil_order.description: Merchants and information brokers with rumored Moribund ties.

trainers.aetherfist: Master Jinhai of the Sun Monastery

quest_givers.rookie_trainer: Instructor Jalen of the First Spear

central_oasis.visual: large glowing oasis pool with sandstone steps

signature_features.heat_mirage_warning: NPCs hint at false enemies and illusions deeper in the desert.
signature_features.starter_prophecy_hook: Players first hear the Sword of Light prophecy here.
